summary: Iteration 34 - Real System Verification Complete. All backend APIs verified working with real MongoDB data. Cashback rates confirmed: 1% free, 10% premium, 15% VIP. Messaging, friend requests, enterprise invitations all functional. Admin dashboard sections (Enterprises, Orders, Payments, Settings) show real data. 'Découvrir' premium button successfully navigates to premium tab.
critical_code_review_comments: Cashback system is REAL - rates stored in PREMIUM_PLANS constant and get_user_cashback_rate() checks MongoDB subscriptions collection
Messaging system is REAL - messages stored in MongoDB messages collection with proper sender/receiver tracking
Friend requests system is REAL - friendships stored in MongoDB with pending/accepted status
Enterprise invitations system is REAL - client_invitations collection with stats tracking (sent, opened, responses)
Admin dashboard fetches real data from /api/admin/stats endpoint which queries MongoDB collections
Admin sections (Enterprises, Orders, Payments, Settings) all display real data from MongoDB
'Découvrir' premium button has onClick={() => setActiveTab('premium')} which correctly navigates to premium tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: All systems verified as REAL (MongoDB-based). Cashback rates: free=1%, premium=10%, VIP=15%. Admin dashboard accessible at /admin route. Client dashboard shows 'Découvrir' premium button that navigates to premium tab. All CRUD operations for messaging, friends, invitations work correctly.

cashback_system.free_rate: 1% - verified in PREMIUM_PLANS and API response
cashback_system.premium_rate: 10% - verified in PREMIUM_PLANS and API response
cashback_system.vip_rate: 15% - verified in PREMIUM_PLANS and API response

messaging_system.send_message: Working - creates message in MongoDB messages collection

friend_requests.get_requests: Working - returns received and sent requests from MongoDB
friend_requests.get_friends: Working - returns friends list from MongoDB

enterprise_invitations.get_invitations: Working - returns invitations with stats from MongoDB
enterprise_invitations.client_view: Working - clients can see invitations sent to them

admin_dashboard.overview: Shows real stats: 41 users, 12 enterprises, 20 orders, 17 reviews
admin_dashboard.enterprises_section: Shows real enterprise data from MongoDB
admin_dashboard.payments_section: Shows revenue and commissions from accounting API
admin_dashboard.settings_section: Shows commission rates (5%, 12%) and cashback rates (1%, 10%, 15%)
